findings.issue: Spec declares size M but contains 19 acceptance criteria (down from 22 in round 1, but still well above the >10 warning threshold). Feature also touches 18+ files across pages, layouts, middleware, composables, and config. No inline comment in the spec explains why M is chosen despite the AC count.
findings.fix: Either (a) re-declare size L to accurately reflect scope, or (b) add a brief parenthetical note in the frontmatter or 'Обмеження' explaining why M is appropriate (e.g. 'frontend-only, single library, no backend/DB, high AC count due to URL strategy permutations not feature complexity').

covered: library choice (@nuxtjs/i18n vs vue-i18n)
URL strategy prefix_except_default
cookie vs localStorage for locale persistence
2 languages uk + en (drop ru)
testing strategy (Vitest + 1 Playwright E2E + optional grep gate)
user problem: cheap to translate now (~10 files), costly later (50+ files)
acceptance criteria checklist
missing-key fallback (en → uk → raw key + dev warn)
eager-load locales (no lazy split)
switcher placement: default topbar right of Logout, auth layout absolute top-right
toggle style (text-only, no dropdown, no flags)
URL detection precedence: URL > cookie > Accept-Language > default uk
EN copy written by agent during implementation
security regression risk on /en/auth/** (routeRules mirror)
auth.global.ts middleware path-based check breakage risk + getRouteBaseName fix
20 hardcoded NuxtLink/navigateTo paths must be localized
Zod live-switch stale messages risk + computed() wrap fix
existing UA test asserts kept (default locale stays uk)
Nuxt 4 + @nuxtjs/i18n@9 path convention risk (frontend/i18n/locales/)
EN copy quality risk + conservative tone mitigation
hydration mismatch risk + SSR cookie resolution mitigation
user story A: first visit no cookie + EN browser → /en/...
user story B: first visit no cookie + UA browser → uk no prefix
user story C: switcher click → URL changes, cookie updates
user story D: sharing EN bookmark → renders EN, sets cookie
user story E: invalid prefix /fr/dashboard → 302 to /dashboard (not 404)
mid-form switch resets form state, no warning
pending-user banner on dashboard localized
invalid cookie value (i18n_lang=xx) → ignored, fall through to Accept-Language → default uk
malformed/missing locale JSON file at build → build fails, CI catches
fallback middleware 00-i18n-fallback.global.ts runs before auth
zero deploy impact (no CI changes, no backend, no env vars)
useApiError() composable signature
verification matrix split agent vs user
brand 'Bot Funnel' not translated
<title>/useHead localization out of scope
no pluralization API
existing tests untouched
auth.global.spec.ts path asserts kept (localePath for uk returns same path)
redirectOn: 'no prefix'
cookieSecure env-conditional (false dev, true prod)
sameSite: 'lax'
app.vue explicit useLocaleHead() to update <html lang>
Playwright bootstrap as separate Wave 1 task

summary: Обидва критичні пропуски round 1 усунено: невалідне значення cookie та пошкоджений JSON-файл присутні і в 'Як повинно працювати' (Edge cases), і в Критеріях приймання. EN-авторство задокументовано явно у двох місцях. Специфікація затверджена; єдине відкрите питання — розмір M при 19 критеріях приймання потребує або зниження до скоупу або re-декларації на L.
